# Amazon Jungle Expeditions

Amazon Jungle Expeditions is a tourism and lodge experience based in Iquitos, Loreto, Peru. The website presents Amazon rainforest tours, lodge information, contact options, reservation links, FAQs, and language-specific landing pages.

## Main URLs

- English landing page: https://landing.amazonjungle-expeditions.com/en
- Spanish landing page: https://landing.amazonjungle-expeditions.com/es
- Main website: https://www.amazonjungle-expeditions.com
- Sitemap: https://landing.amazonjungle-expeditions.com/sitemap.xml

## Business context

Amazon Jungle Expeditions offers guided Amazon rainforest experiences, lodge stays, nature tours, local culture activities, and reservation assistance through WhatsApp and email.

## Important sections

- Hero / main reservation call to action
- Tour packages
- FAQ
- Contact and social sharing
- Language switcher EN / ES

## Contact

- WhatsApp: +51 943214093
- Email: reservas@amazonjungle-expeditions.com
- Location: Iquitos, Loreto, Peru
